texts.orig: Thisisforinformationofall concernedstudents thatPost-Matric andotherScholarshipschemesof various categories are open/will be opening soon,for applying andrenewal online through National ScholarshipPortalsfortheyear2021-22.
texts.text: Thisisforinformationofall concernedstudents thatPost-Matric andotherScholarshipschemesof various categories are open/will be opening soon,for applying andrenewal online through National ScholarshipPortalsfortheyear2021-22.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thestudentswho areeligiblefor anyof the abovescholarshipschemes areinstructed toAPPLYor RENEWonline in therespectiveportals within stipulated timeand submit selfattested copiesofthe necessarydocumentstoSriAmarDebnath,Lecturer&INOforinstitute levelverification.For anyother relevantinformation and assistance,studentsmay also approach theINO.
